sessionStart.prompt: Repo: afenda-Xerp (pnpm + turbo). Apps: apps/erp (3000), apps/docs (3001). Governance: AGENTS.md + .cursor/rules/ (env: env-workflow.mdc). Skills: .cursor/skills/. Use pnpm only. Env: edit .env.config / .env.secret only, then pnpm env:sync && pnpm env:doctor. Hooks guard shell/MCP/env policy and run scoped stop quality gates. Prefer typecheck, pnpm check, and tests over starting dev servers.
